description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a broad, low-pitched hip roof covered in blue-gray shingles. The front facade features a central entrance with a small overhang, flanked by large windows on one side and smaller windows on the other. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige color, with darker trim around the windows and roof edges. A paved driveway leads up to the front door, and the house sits on a neatly manicured green lawn. The rear and side elevations have fewer and more widely spaced windows, with one side showing a large picture window. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and a focus on horizontal proportions.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a blue hip roof, beige walls, and large front windows, set on a green lawn with a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large front windows, and the driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large picture window and the expanse of the hip roof, with the driveway visible to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a long, uninterrupted wall with two small windows and a large window on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing three windows and the driveway extending to the side of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front windows and large side window
